failures.description: The agent invented an unsupported item and price instead of using the cheapest item from the tool output.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for the cheapest available Electric Kettle. The tool call was correct and returned sorted available items; the first and cheapest item was item_id 1240311797 at price 137.17. At index 4, the Executor produced an answer claiming item 0000000000 costs $0.01. That item_id and price are absent from the user request, plan, and ProductCatalogSearch output. The fabricated value was used as the final answer and was not corrected later.
